faqs.answer: Our cockroach extermination services in Rye range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property and the extent of the infestation. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Rye and Westchester County. Our local technicians can typically arrive within hours of your call to assess the situation and begin treatment immediately.

faqs.question: What methods do you use for cockroach extermination in Rye homes?
faqs.answer: We use a combination of targeted gel baits, residual sprays, and integrated pest management techniques tailored to your specific situation. faqs.question: Do you guarantee your cockroach extermination services in Rye?
faqs.answer: Yes, we stand behind our work with a service guarantee. If cockroaches return between scheduled treatments, we'll come back at no additional charge. We also offer ongoing prevention plans to keep your Rye property roach-free year-round.
